title: KI Store Velvet White Christmas Tree Flower Decoration 6pcs 25cm Christmas Poinsettia Flower Picks for Xmas Tree Wreath Garland Decor
features: Eye-catching Christmas flower ornaments to decorate the centerpiece of your home during the holiday.
White Velvet Christmas Poinsettia for Christmas tree, wreath, Garland, and lantern decor.
This flower picks spray features with velvet petals adorned with sequins and shiny stamens.
Artificial Christmas Tree Flowers measurement: 25cm (10 Inch) in diameter.
Set of 6 White Christmas Poinsettia Flowers for Christmas Tree Decorations.
description: KI Store Christmas Poinsettia for Christmas tree, wreath, Garland, and lantern decor.
